profile.role_zh: 土木工程大一·军训标兵

profile.contradiction_en: Hears civil-eng job market is bad vs. too afraid to switch
profile.deep_zh: 对未来的迷茫不敢和家里说
profile.deep_en: Doesn't dare tell family of his confusion

profile.constraint_zh: 课程难度大跨度大；不敢问老师问题
profile.constraint_en: Courses leap in difficulty; too shy to ask
profile.bias_zh: 倾向认为自己不够聪明而非方法不对
profile.bias_en: Blames his own intellect rather than his method

profile.narrative_en: Others can learn it, so can I with more time
